posts.text:
Truly incredible:

The Nasdaq 100 ETF, $QQQ, surged +1.1% between 3:40 PM ET and 5:00 PM ET today without ANY major news.

Options flows on $QQQ long calls were surging into the 4:00 PM ET market close.

At 5:13 PM ET, President Trump said he is considering “winding down” the Iran war.

$QQQ is now up +2% from its low, with March 23rd dated calls set to open +200% above today’s lows.

It’s going to be an eventful weekend.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
